response.overview: VERTIGO is the punchline-packed debut comedy special from Scotland’s Connor Burns, musing on submarines, aging knees, relationships and the inevitable family drama. His hilarious and brilliant material hits every mark and is served via the signature powerhouse delivery by one of the fastest rising new stand-up stars in the global live stand-up scene. Connor’s prolific joke writing, his intelligent, razor-sharp wit and relatable friendly persona is punctuated by a healthy Scottish-level cynicism that has also seen him become a social media sensation.
response.title: Connor Burns: Vertigo
